name: Partnership Subchapter K Election Out

eligibility.description: Must be for investment purposes only (not active business) or joint production/extraction where income can be determined without computing partnership taxable income.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows certain unincorporated organizations used for investment or joint production (like oil and gas or co-investments) to elect to be excluded from partnership tax rules, allowing members to report income/expenses directly.
